pageContext.name: Sub-Zero 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The second fighter in the Mortal Kombat Chibi® series features the powerful assassin of the Lin Kuei clan, Sub-Zero.   Officially licensed, this 'cool' coin has been shaped and colored to resemble the early version of Sub-Zero as Chibi art. He appears in his iconic blue tunic and mask, with contrasting black headgear. The Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   The 1oz pure silver coin arrives in a Mortal Kombat-themed box, which includes a large window for display. Printed at the back, you will find the Certificate of Authenticity and the coin's unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000 coins.   Defend Earthrealm with this mighty piece today!
